text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Five days left until tryouts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shoes I ordered—ones durable enough to withstand Oguri Cap's
devastating power—finally arrived, so I head over to give them to her.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: New shoes? For me?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...But why? I'm not even your trainee yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her about the conversation I had with Tamamo Cross and how
tryouts are where a student proves her true worth by giving it her all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama said that? I see. So that's how tryouts work.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Got it. Thanks for the shoes. I'll break them in as I practice for the
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap accepts the shoes, after which I decide to keep an eye on
her as she takes them for a spin.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Huff, huff... Haha... Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: This is amazing! My legs... are light as feathers!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you again for the shoes.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: They're... absolutely perfect. I'll take good care of them.
choice_data_list: I'm just glad to see you running so happily.
I'm just glad to see you running so happily.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: H-huh? What—?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's no big deal... I think. It's just... Uh...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What you said. It felt really... familiar...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's nothing. Don't worry about it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
In any case, thank you one last time for the shoes. I promise to pull
out all the stops come tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Five days pass, and the time for tryouts finally arrives.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running today is not only Oguri Cap but also another student
rumored to be just as fast and skilled—Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The podiums are absolutely buzzing with excitement. If I didn't know
any better, I'd think this is a G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Wow. There sure are a lot of people here today.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're right. Are tryouts always like this?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
No, actually. It's quite unusual to have this large of an audience... I
wonder if there's some celebrity here today.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A celebrity? That would explain the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Tryouts Staff A
text_block_list.text: Super Creek, please get ready for the race!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am! I'll be right there! I have to go now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: See ya.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wait, who even was that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two are completely oblivious to all the attention they're
garnering. Although maybe in this case, ignorance is bliss...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not that it matters. Once they start racing, the crowd roars with
excitement, and it's clear why everyone's here today.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap is closing the gap! She isn't wasting a single second!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Almost there! She's taking the lead! But wait! Creek is speeding up!
Will she be able to lose Oguri?! It's gonna be a close match! Who will
win?! Oguri or Creek?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri ends up in second place behind Super Creek, who won by a
mere fraction of a second.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Second place... Huh...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I got brand-new shoes... and ran as fast as I could... But I still got
second...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This place really is something else. Once I debut, I'll be able to race
even more rivals like Tama and Creek...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: This is awesome... and exciting!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Nice job, Oguri Cap! You were amazing!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Very impressive. I'm currently looking to recruit more talented
runners to train under my tutelage, if you're interested...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah, right... I need to get scouted before I can make my debut...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks, but... Sorry, I'll have to decline. Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap awkwardly wades through the crowd and makes her way
towards me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Did you watch the race?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Th-thanks.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Um... yeah, it has to be you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I have a favor to ask. Would you be my trainer?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The guidance you gave and your words of support... They felt
genuine.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Praise or criticism, you're genuine like the folks back home. It feels
nice. Really takes me back.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Even though I'm far from home, as long as you're my trainer, I feel like
I can ease my mind and put my all into running.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So... how about it? Would you please be my trainer?
choice_data_list: Yeah! Let's make everyone back home proud!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Of course! I wouldn't want anything less. Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: All right. First things first...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Growl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Let's grab something to eat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With nothing other than food on her mind, we depart in search of
sustenance. My days of training Oguri Cap have only just begun!
